textByHash.545948b8799b2d1a646f80ed832a589b88a70e1d: Hey look it's the hero! It's great to have you around.
textByHash.7ff7bbb507a675eb3375022bcd9a55b50a9cc7cf: Hello. Sorry, I'd love to stop and chat, but I have a new find that I need to work on. If you need anything, I'm sure Prescott can help.
textByHash.fd9164de12c40e74b4dc49f5502bbb1df4bbdd88: Hello there. Did you see that dwarf by the big forge? I think he wanted to talk to you.
